ocr_findings.description: Section banner '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' in OCR line 3. The mascot logo glyph 'コレ' was misread as 'つし' — same error pattern as the icon-based heading on other pages.
Attribution line reads '別表 https://...' in OCR (line 34); image shows '引用 https://...'. 引用 vs 別表 is a semantic difference but low impact.
Furigana 'みくしゃ' (OCR line 38) appears as floating text before 複写 body; in image it is small ruby above 複写. Cosmetic.

reviewer_notes: Page covers CBT exam interface and the 複写 (copy) concept with screenshot diagram. The recurring 'コレ→つし' misread is a med-severity wrong_char on a key section header. Attribution label 引用 misread as 別表 is a minor wrong_char. The embedded screenshot is represented as an image placeholder which is acceptable.
